items.toString: This work item relates to PDT-2894

items.fromString: Mass Email, Mass SMS, and Penalty Calculation currently do not consistently consider contract version validity during data resolution and processing.
items.toString:
*Problem:* 

Mass Email, Mass SMS, and Penalty Calculation currently do not consistently consider contract version validity during data resolution and processing.

*Expected Result:* 

* Mass Email and Mass SMS resolve contracts/customers using the correct contract version for the relevant date and no longer use inconsistent version sources.
* Penalty Calculation uses a single date-resolved contract version context for all version-dependent variables and POD scope.
* All three processes behave consistently for the same contract/date input and return clear validation errors when required version-scoped data is missing.
* Historical records remain stable and traceable to the version context used at processing time.
Mass Email, Mass SMS, and Penalty Calculation currently do not consistently consider contract version validity during data resolution and processing.
This work item relates to PDT-2599

content.text: Mass Email, Mass SMS, and Penalty Calculation currently do not consistently consider contract version validity during data resolution and processing.
Mass Email and Mass SMS resolve contracts/customers using the correct contract version for the relevant date and no longer use inconsistent version sources.
Penalty Calculation uses a single date-resolved contract version context for all version-dependent variables and POD scope.
All three processes behave consistently for the same contract/date input and return clear validation errors when required version-scoped data is missing.
Historical records remain stable and traceable to the version context used at processing time.

fields.summary: Changes in processes impacted by version validity
BE - Service Contract - The system doesn't consider the contract version status
[Backend] when contract number selected without contract version, when eligible versions exist, latest Valid/Signed  by both sides version is not selected.

content.text: Please, review the attached file and approve.
Please, review this example on DEV env. We have a customer with 3 versions →
, the first one is Valid/Signed by both sides and use customer version 1, the second is Cancelled and use customer version 2. Create a mass email for this contract with it’s version 1 →
The system creates an individual email →
with wrong communication (from version 3 of the customer). Create a mass sms for same contract without version  →
- the result is the same , the created individual sms takes commnunication from version 3 (latest) of the customer →
. Example for penalty with execution date 20.04.2026 →
, the generated email takes the communication data from cancelled contract version →
